description: Site-specific BN-RRM for Rio Tinto BC Works (ALCAN Smelter), Kitimat (registry_id=0331, marine). 20-node Landis causal DAG with hierarchical borrowing from general model. N=5 site stations. Tier 1 borrowed wholesale; Tiers 2-4 use general CPTs as priors.
limitations: N=5: Hierarchical borrowing with ~38% general-model prior influence (Tier 2)
Diagnostic replay is NOT validation (model-derived labels, circularity)
No spatial generalization within the site
Tier 1 CPTs borrowed wholesale from general model; Tiers 2-4 are ~62% site-data-driven

diagnostic.disclaimer: NOT validation. Labels are derived from _determine_observed_risk() heuristic, not independent consultant assessments. LOO at N=5: approximate 95% CI width ~88%. This checks internal consistency only.
